display_name: [Free Promotional Period] Seedance 2.0 Fast is the speed-optimized version of Seedance 2.0, designed to generate cinematic videos with native audio sync, camera control, and stable motion more quickly
description:
[Free Promotional Period] Seedance 2.0 Fast is the speed-optimized version of Seedance 2.0, designed to generate cinematic videos with native audio sync, camera control, and stable motion more quickly. It is a strong choice for rapid iteration and high-volume production because it is built to deliver faster results at a lower cost than the standard version.
Served from Malaysia.

This bot supports optional parameters for additional customization.
